name: Median income - one dependent child
description: Employee earning EUR 30,000 with 1 child. Reduced 2nd bracket (18% vs 20%) and 3rd bracket (24% vs 26%). Higher tax credit (EUR 900).

sources.description: 2026 child-dependent rates from Ministry of Finance: 1 child gets 18% on 2nd bracket, 24% on 3rd
